hub_intro: Welcome to the Regional Heritage Museum. I'm the Curator.
We have three new exhibits focused on First Nations history and HASS skills.
Choose a case file to begin your investigation. Categorize every source you find!
hub_return: Welcome back, Researcher. Which case will you document next?

intro: I'm the Exhibit Specialist. We're looking at the diversity of Indigenous cultures.
Find the three sources in this room. Remember to identify if they are Primary or Secondary!
Research Lead here. We're investigating ancient trade routes.
Look for evidence of international connections. Is the evidence Social or Environmental?
Maritime Curator here. The Torres Strait has a seafaring history like no other.
Check the artefacts. How do they show the Islander connection to the sea?
